title: geranium litoreum
intro: Geranium litoreum, also known as the coastal geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. The health benefits of Geranium litoreum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual issues due to its hormone-regulating properties. Geranium litoreum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic benefits.
